hero.subtitle: Modern technical education with practical classes, projects and professional tracks.

section1.heading: About Us
section1.lead: A secondary technical school with multiple professional tracks, modern equipment and dedicated teachers.
section1.p1: ОSTU „Gostivar" is one of the leading technical schools in the region. Students work on real projects and practical classes to better prepare for university or employment.
section1.p2: With modern infrastructure and professional staff, we offer education that follows world standards in the technical and technological field.

section2.label: Professional Training
section2.heading:
Practical
Classes
section2.p1: Each track offers practical work in specialized laboratories and workshops, where students acquire skills directly applicable in industry.
section2.p2: We cooperate with local companies for
section2.p2rest: — opening doors to the real world of work while still in school.

about.historyP1: The first classes at the school were formed in the 1960/61 school year in the electrical and mechanical tracks under the name 'Industrial School with Practical Work' in Gostivar. The school was founded by the People's Committee of Gostivar municipality in 1960 with decision no.5233 from 12.09.1960.
about.historyP2: On 04.09.1961 the first teacher council was held, and on 20.11.1961 the first school board session took place. The school building was put into use on 18.11.1963, on the day of the liberation of Gostivar.
about.historyP3: The last decision for verification of the tracks was made on 09.06.2006 under number 11-2938/2.

scholarships.title: Scholarships
scholarships.intro: In the Republic of North Macedonia, scholarships for secondary school students are awarded through a competition by the Ministry of Education and Science. Students are informed through the school when a competition is announced.
scholarships.stateDesc: Scholarships are announced through an official competition. The homeroom teacher informs students and guides them on how to apply. Applications are usually submitted online via a link provided by the institutions.
scholarships.step1Desc: The homeroom teacher notifies students when a scholarship competition is announced.
scholarships.step2Desc: Students receive a link through which they can apply online independently.
scholarships.step3Desc: The school can help with document preparation or additional information.

praktika.title: Practical Training
praktika.intro: At OSTU Gostivar we believe that real learning happens when students work with real code, real problems and real tools. Our practical training is designed to prepare students for the industry — not just to know theory, but to be able to work.
praktika.act1Desc: Students write code in real time alongside the teacher. Each student works on their own computer and follows the teacher's steps while building functional applications.
praktika.act2Desc: The teacher intentionally introduces bugs in the code, and students locate and fix them. This teaches them to think logically and work with real problems.
praktika.act3Desc: Students work on small but real projects — web apps, algorithms, databases — to gain practical experience directly applicable in the workplace.
praktika.act4Desc: Students are divided into teams and work together on a shared project. They learn to use version control, communicate and divide tasks among themselves.
praktika.act5Desc: After completing the project, students review each other's code. The teacher provides feedback and teaches industry standards.
praktika.act6Desc: Students deploy their applications online and test them in a real environment. They learn about hosting, domains, CI/CD processes and automated testing.
praktika.toolsDesc: Students work with industry-standard tools — the same tools used in real companies.
praktika.why1Desc: Students finish their education with a portfolio of real projects they can show to future employers.
praktika.why2Desc: Through debugging and problem solving, students develop an analytical way of thinking applicable in every field.
praktika.why3Desc: The methodologies and tools we use are the same ones applied in technology companies around the world.
